name: set kortmelding

sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS incidents (
    timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    incidentid INTEGER UNIQUE,
    active INTEGER DEFAULT 0 CHECK(active IN (0, 1)),
    topic TEXT,
    payload TEXT
    );
name: prepare db

sql:
INSERT INTO incidents (incidentid, active, payload)
VALUES ($incidentid, 1, $payload)
ON CONFLICT(incidentid) DO UPDATE SET
    active = excluded.active,
    payload = excluded.payload,
    timestamp = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
